description: PINE BLUFF DAILY GRAPHIC I 11 j PUBLISHED EVERY AFTERNOON EXCEPT SUNDAY BY THE Graphic Printing Compy J W ADAMS Editor and Hanaeer E W MARTIN Associate Editor SUBSCRIPTION PRICE Daily one copy one week 15c Daily one copy one month 05c Daily one copy nix monthsjl75 Daily one copy one year750 Weekly per year150 A 11 SUBSCRIPT IONS DUE IN AOVANCE WITHOUT EXCEPTION AIVEKTIHINO KATES MADE KNOWN ON APPLICATION OFFICE NO 117 PINE STREET TELEPHONE No 102 Entered at the Postoffice at Pine Bluff Ark as seeondislass mail matter y PINEi BLUFF ARK DEC 14 1893 Police in Paris are still watching the anarchists Its a wise plan Legal proceedings nave oeen in stituted to secure the removal of the Reading receivers Gov Altgeld says he knows why the Germania Club snubbed him So do other people The ancient feast of the Guadalupe is on in the City of Mexico Piety and bull fights are in order One of the new 1000 bonds of Toledo is missing and people are beginning to wonder who is missing with it ____________ Mrs Nicolaus has gone to Naples with her guardian George is relieved and Howard thinks it was almost a tight
